title: Reference And Dynamic Reference Test Fixture
description: Synthetic 2020-12-style schema (not Draft 3, not real canonicalizer output) used only to exercise $ref (external reference) and $dynamicRef/$dynamicAnchor rendering in the recursive Carbon layouts.

billingAddress.description: Billing address, defined in an external shared schema.

shippingAddress.description: Optional shipping address, same external shared schema as billing.

extensionPoint.description: Allows a derived schema to plug in additional validation via a dynamic reference back to this schema's own dynamic anchor.
